title: Sort Kanban according to person
excerpt:
Currently can only sort by Status or Priority. Would love to be able to sort by Owner as well. 
Also, just to vent… currently to do this, the support agent suggested I set up FIVE NEW VIEWS!!! 4 for each of the people I …

posts.author: Esty (Esty Lizmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently can only sort by Status or Priority. Would love to be able to sort by Owner as well.

Also, just to vent… currently to do this, the support agent suggested I set up FIVE NEW VIEWS!!! 4 for each of the people I want to show, and then the 5th view to amalgmate all. For a simple visualisation, this makes ZERO sense. And I refuse to pay for Pro just for this one simple thing.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Esty!

Charlotte here! Happy to help out with this!

When you go to your Kanban view and click “person” at the top of it, does this not show you the filtered results you’re looking to see? Or are you wanting to specify which people column the view is sorted by here?

Screen Shot 2023-09-06 at 3.50.41 PM776×730 43.4 KB

Totally hear you about how that 5-view solution isn’t a good practice for what you’re looking for. Hopefully this idea is helpful but please let me know if it’s not what you need!

posts.author: Aulysius_Corner_Rep (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Esty !

Great question about Sorting Kanban according to person. The answer is actually covered in the 2nd episode of our brand new Aulysius Corner series, launched specifically to tackle your questions!

Our team of monday com wizard dives deep into this topic. You can jump right in at the [18:59] mark to see what options there are for Sorting Kanban according to person.

We cover a bunch of other mysteries in this episode too, so if you have any lingering questions, be sure to check it out:

  1. Go to Youtube
  2. Search → Aulysius Corner 2 - Providing answers to monday .com Community
  3. Get your problem solved!

Hope this helps!

~ Aulysius Corner Rep

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Esty,

You can use our app Multi Board Kanban for this. This gives you the option to split by Owner ( and also by group, dropdown etc )

image1546×821 73.5 KB

Is this what you had in mind?
